notes: Active frontier lane targeting upstream PR #1791 K_KVShare_Wider GatedDeltaNet / FLA on SP8192 via a custom HF export. No TTT, no SLOT, no XSA, no n-gram overlay.
purpose: Run the active #1791-class SP8192 FLA frontier lane end to end on 8xH100 with the custom matched FineWeb export and donor-style int6+zstd-22 artifact path.
prerequisite: Download the SP8192 custom cache with `MATCHED_FINEWEB_REPO_ID=kevclark/parameter-golf MATCHED_FINEWEB_REMOTE_ROOT_PREFIX=datasets python data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py --variant sp8192`, then verify readiness with `python scripts/check_run_ready.py configs/h100/root_sp8192_pr1791_fla_8xh100.json`.
success_criteria: Finish donor-style train/export/roundtrip cleanly, keep the artifact under 16,000,000 bytes, and log the final exact roundtrip metric without any eval-time network access.
timing_expectation: Frontier H100 lane only. Validate the 1xH100 proxy first if the FLA stack has not yet been smoke-tested on the current image.
